---
applyTo: "src/components/**/*.tsx"
---

# Frontend Component Guidelines

Rules for all components in `src/components/`.

## Component Rules

- Functional components only — no class components
- TypeScript strict typing — no `any`, explicit return types
- Tailwind CSS v4 semantic tokens only — no inline styles, no arbitrary values
- shadcn/ui primitives for all interactive elements — no native `<button>` or `<input>`
- Accessibility required — `aria-label` on icon buttons, `<label>` on form inputs

## Component Placement

| Category             | Directory            | Purpose                                       |
| -------------------- | -------------------- | --------------------------------------------- |
| shadcn/ui primitives | `components/ui/`     | Generated by shadcn CLI only                  |
| Custom shared        | `components/shared/` | Reusable across features (Header, PageLoader) |
| Domain forms         | `components/forms/`  | Form components (LoginForm, ContactForm)      |
| Feature-specific     | `features/{name}/`   | Scoped to one feature                         |

## Required Patterns

- Accept `className?: string` prop on all visual components
- Use `cn()` from `@/lib/utils` for conditional class merging
- Import from barrel exports: `import { Button } from "@/components/ui"`
- Follow shadcn compound patterns: `Card > CardHeader > CardTitle > CardContent`
- Use CVA for custom component variants

## Barrel Exports

Every component folder MUST have an `index.ts` with named re-exports:

```typescript
export { Button, buttonVariants } from "./button";
export { Card, CardHeader, CardTitle, CardDescription, CardContent, CardFooter } from "./card";
export { Input } from "./input";
export { Label } from "./label";
```

## Naming

- File: PascalCase `.tsx` (`UserCard.tsx`)
- Props: `{ComponentName}Props` interface
- Folder: kebab-case (`user-profile/`)
- Tests: co-located `{ComponentName}.test.tsx`
